text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, it starts raining while I'm out, so I
decide to go shopping to pass the time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, just as the rain starts letting up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh! Sup, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer runs up to me from out of nowhere,
dressed in her signature racewear and drenched
from head to toe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you talking about my clothes? Don't
worry! They'll dry while I run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oops, I suppose that's not much of an
explanation, is it? Well, you see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer gives me a smile that's closer to a
grimace and brings me up to speed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...So anyway, I got invited to one of the Mejiro
family's stuffy old parties.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Then someone was like, "A car has been prepared
for your return, miss," and whatever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And, I dunno. I just couldn't stand it anymore, so I
yelled out a quick apology and hightailed it out
of there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That sounds so much like her, I can't help but
smile, but I'm still worried about her clothes,
which look soaked all the way through.
choice_data_list:
Are you sure it's okay to leave your racewear
dripping wet like that?

Are you sure it's okay to leave your racewear
dripping wet like that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Welp. Guess it's only natural that you're worried
about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But it's fine, really. I had my outfit made like this
for this very purpose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like, my signature racewear doesn't look all that
different from my regular clothes, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's why I don't really have to fuss over it that
much. It's easy to run in and easy to take the lead
in.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The best part is, I can just sprint off whenever I
get the urge to run alone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It feels odd to hear her talking about wanting to
be alone since she's almost always part of a
group, so I ask her about her wording.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah. I love hanging out with everyone, of
course, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
When I'm at the front of a race, I'm alone, aren't
I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I guess that why I sometimes get the urge to get
out there and run without thinking about
anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I just want to head for the horizon, alone and free
as a bird, and go as far as I want!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her gaze is set to some distant point, out beyond
all the restrictions and restraints. Some place
free...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We stand there silently for a few moments until
we're abruptly interrupted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Agh! It's coming down again!
choice_data_list: How about we hit a cafe till the rain passes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We should be able to escape the worst of it
if we run back! Let's go—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open an umbrella and hold it over our heads. I
hope she doesn't feel too embarrassed to share it
with me, but I only have the one.
choice_data_list: I can't let you catch a cold.
I can't let you catch a cold.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Talk about being a rizzler, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Now I wanna do that for someone. Just open up
an umbrella all cool-like and go, "I can't let you
catch a cold."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I dunno if I can pull it off as well as you did,
though! That was just way too smooth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oooh! I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Here's your hot coffee.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her being in her signature racewear,
Mejiro Palmer looks completely in her element
inside the cafe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hm? Whatcha starin' at me for?
choice_data_list: Just thinking how well that racewear suits you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wha? Huh? What's with the sudden compliment?!
choice_data_list: Oh, nothing. It just kind of dawned on me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh! Look, our coffees are gonna get cold if
you keep talking nonsense! Down the hatch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer and I relax and share some laughs
after that.
